name: GHR-VLM: Making Zero-Shot Transit Video Analytics Realizable with Grounded Hybrid Reasoning

description: arXiv:2607.13569v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Transit video understanding can provide valuable fine-grained data that conventional passenger counters and fare systems cannot capture. However, supervised video models require task-specific annotations, while applying vision-language models (VLMs) directly to long onboard videos is unreliable and costly. To leverage the complementary s...
author: Kaicong Huang, Weiheng Oh, Jack M. Reilly, Thomas Guggisberg, Ruimin Ke
